children.heading: Authority or requirements to cover additional individuals
children.label: a Authority or requirements to cover additional individuals
A
children.text: Section 602(a)(32) of this title (relating to individuals who are deemed recipients of aid but for whom a payment is not made).1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: B
children.text: Section 602(a)(37) of this title (relating to individuals who lose AFDC eligibility due to increased earnings).1

children.label: C
children.text: Section 606(h) of this title (relating to individuals who lose AFDC eligibility due to increased collection of child or spousal support).1

children.label: D
children.text: Section 682(e)(6) of this title (relating to certain individuals participating in work supplementation programs).1

children.label: A
children.text: (relating to treatment of couples sharing an accommodation in a facility).Section 1382(e) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: (relating to benefits for individuals who perform substantial gainful activity despite severe medical impairment).Section 1382h of this title

children.label: C
children.text: (relating to preservation of benefit status for disabled widows and widowers who lost SSI benefits because of 1983 changes in actuarial reduction formula).Section 1383c(b) of this title

children.label: D
children.text: (relating to individuals who lose eligibility for SSI benefits due to entitlement to child’s insurance benefits under ).Section 1383c(c) of this titlesection 402(d) of this title

children.label: E
children.text: (relating to individuals who lose eligibility for SSI benefits due to entitlement to early widow’s or widower’s insurance benefits under section 402(e) or (f) of this title).Section 1383c(d) of this title

children.heading: Foster care and adoption assistance
children.label: 3 Foster care and adoption assistance
children.text: Sections 672(h) and 673(b) of this title (relating to medical assistance for children in foster care and for adopted children).

children.heading: Refugee assistance
children.label: 4 Refugee assistance
children.text: (relating to medical assistance for certain refugees).Section 1522(e)(5) of title 8

children.label: A
children.text: (relating to deeming eligible for medical assistance certain essential persons).Section 230 of Public Law 93–66

children.label: B
children.text: (relating to deeming eligible for medical assistance certain persons in medical institutions).Section 231 of Public Law 93–66

children.label: C
children.text: (relating to deeming eligible for medical assistance certain blind and disabled medically indigent persons).Section 232 of Public Law 93–66

children.label: D
children.text: (relating to deeming eligible for medical assistance certain individuals receiving mandatory State supplementary payments).Section 13(c) of Public Law 93–233

children.label: E
children.text: (relating to deeming eligible for medical assistance certain individuals who would be eligible for supplemental security income benefits but for cost-of-living increases in social security benefits).Section 503 of Public Law 94–566

children.label: F
children.text: (relating to continuing medicaid eligibility for certain recipients of Department of Veterans Affairs pensions).Section 310(b)(1) of Public Law 96–272
(relating to requirement for operation of certain State supplementation programs).Section 1382g of this title
(relating to requiring mandatory minimum State supplementation of SSI benefits program).Section 212(a) of Public Law 93–66
